feedback: The onboarding flow was quick and the setup guide answered most of our questions.
Billing took two follow-ups to fix and that slowed down our rollout.
The product is stable but the admin documentation is still too thin for new users.
Support resolved our login issue in one day and kept us updated throughout.
The dashboard is easier to use than last quarter and adoption is improving.
We like the feature depth but pricing still feels high for smaller teams.
API examples are missing for the workflow we need and that caused avoidable delay.
Overall sentiment is positive because uptime has been strong and service feels more reliable.
